Deerfield Beach FHA Loans

Deerfield Beach Home Loans

FHA loans in Deerfield Beach, Florida

At Broward County's northern edge, Deerfield Beach offers a relaxed beach-town feel, a popular pier, and a wide range of housing — from beachfront and 55-and-over condos to inland single-family homes in neighborhoods like Deer Creek. Broward's high-cost FHA limit gives buyers extra room, making FHA workable across much of the local market.

Broward County FHA limit (1-unit)$667,000

2026 single-family

Minimum down3.5%

With a 580+ score

Min credit score580

500–579 with 10% down

Property types1–4 units

Owner-occupied

What the FHA limit means in Deerfield Beach

Broward County is a designated high-cost area, so its 2026 single-family FHA limit is $667,000, above the $541,287 statewide floor — meaning you can finance higher-priced Deerfield Beach homes than in most of Florida. Confirm Broward County's exact limit with HUD's official FHA loan-limit lookup. That higher limit covers a good share of Deerfield Beach condos and homes, with luxury beachfront units being the main exception.

Beach condos and FHA approval in Deerfield Beach

Much of Deerfield Beach is condos, including large 55+ communities — and FHA requires the building to be FHA-approved or the unit to qualify for Single-Unit Approval (see our condo guide). Remember FHA is for primary residences you'll occupy. Inland single-family neighborhoods like Deer Creek are simpler FHA purchases, helped by Broward's higher loan limit.

Down payment help for Deerfield Beach buyers

You don't have to cover the down payment alone. FHA allows gift funds, sellers can contribute up to 6% toward closing costs, and Deerfield Beach buyers can often pair FHA with assistance from the Florida Housing Finance Corporation and Broward County's local SHIP-funded programs. Funding and eligibility change frequently, so we'll help you confirm what's currently available — see our FHA down payment assistance guide.

Neighborhoods we serve in Deerfield Beach

We help buyers throughout Deerfield Beach and Broward County, including The Cove, Deer Creek, Century Village, and the beachfront. Wherever you're looking, we'll explain your FHA loan limit, rate, and monthly payment — and get you pre-approved fast.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Deerfield Beach (Broward County) for 2026?+
Broward County is a high-cost area, so its 2026 FHA limit is $667,000, above the $541,287 Florida floor. Confirm the exact figure with HUD's official lookup.
Can I buy a Deerfield Beach condo with FHA?+
Yes, if the building is FHA-approved or the unit qualifies for Single-Unit Approval, and you'll live in it as your primary residence. We check first.
How much down payment do I need in Deerfield Beach?+
As little as 3.5% with a 580+ score; gift funds and seller credits can help.
Are there single-family FHA options in Deerfield Beach?+
Yes — inland neighborhoods like Deer Creek offer single-family homes that work well with FHA.
Do you serve all of Broward County?+
Yes — Deerfield Beach, Pompano Beach, Coconut Creek, and surrounding communities.
